subjects.subject_name: Department of Health and Human Services

calendar.description: House Health and Human Services Hearing
Senate Transportation, Public Utilities, Energy, and Technology Hearing

general_provisions: This bill addresses transparency in the Medicaid program.
hilighted_provisions: This bill:<hr><ltbullet>requires the Division of Integrated Healthcare (division) to maintain a dashboard of certain Medicaid data;<hr><ltbullet>requires the division to publish certain data and reports on the division's website;<hr><ltbullet>requires certain participants in the Medicaid program to:<hr><ltbullet1> identify, report on, and repay improper payments; and<hr><ltbullet1>develop corrective action plans to address improper payments;<hr><ltbullet>requires the Department of Health and Human Services (department) to publish reports of improper payments and corrective action plans on the department's website;<hr><ltbullet>provides rulemaking authority, including for sanctions for violations of the provisions of this bill;<hr><ltbullet>defines terms; and<hr><ltbullet>makes technical and conforming changes.
